descriptions.text: Heroes of Hyrule is a cancelled spinoff game from The Legend of Zelda series developed by Retro Studios. In the game, the player would've played as a Goron, Zora and a Rito who are on a quest to save Link and Zelda after they've both been captured by Ganon.

Heroes of Hyrule is a proposed video game by developer Retro Studios in 2002. The game's concept involved merging the exploration and puzzles solving gameplay of The Legend of Zelda with the turn based battles placed on a grid of Final Fantasy Tactics. Despite the creation of a detailed game design document, the pitch to Nintendo was immediately rejected and subsequently abandoned. The game was publicly unknown of in the following two decades, until an investigation and report on it was published by YouTube channel Did You Know Gaming? in 2022. The game's cancellation, and Nintendo's efforts to take down stories on it, was lamented by publications.
